_publications._publicationTitle: Inhibition of YAP/TAZ-driven TEAD activity prevents growth of NF2-null schwannoma and meningioma.

_contextSnippet: For TAZ staining, note raised nuclear TAZ expression in NF2 single (P; arrows) and NF2/YAP double (Q; arrows) null tissue, which is not present in NF2/TAZ double null DRG tissue (R; arrows)
details: Successfully detected elevated nuclear TAZ expression in NF2 single null and NF2/YAP double null tissue, which was not present in NF2/TAZ double null DRG tissue
